name: Cyberpunk
description: Blade Runner 2049, Cyberpunk 2077, Tron Legacy. Dark high-tech command center with neon accents, glitch effects, HUD panels, cut corners, and scan line overlays. You're a hacker in 2077.
source: Cyberpunk aesthetics — Blade Runner, Ghost in the Shell, Akira, Tron Legacy, Cyberpunk 2077

demo.title: NEXUS//CORP
demo.subtitle: Neural Interface Command Center
demo.statusBar: SYSTEM STATUS: ONLINE | NETWORK: 99.7% | THREAT LEVEL: LOW | DATE: 2077.03.15

suggestions.icons: Lucide (stroke 1.5px) or custom monoline HUD-style icons
suggestions.components: cut-corner panels, scan-line overlays, glitch text, neon-glow borders, radar/pulse animations, data tables with colored status indicators, progress bars with neon fills
suggestions.avoid: rounded pills, soft shadows, pastel colors, organic shapes, playful illustrations, serif fonts
suggestions.texture: scan lines via repeating-linear-gradient, noise overlay via SVG filter, glitch text-shadow offsets
